name: Aperture size outliers
description: Detect apertures with out-of-range or unusable SIZES in Gerber artwork: definitions that fail to parse, apertures with no extractable numeric dimension, and apertures whose size is implausibly small or large. This is a size/parse sanity check, not a detector of missing, ambiguous, or conflicting aperture definitions.
what_it_measures: Count of apertures whose size is out of the plausible range or whose dimension cannot be determined from the image data.
